title: 一個法國妹分享佢地搞黃背心嗰陣搞過啲乜 同一啲佢覺得嘅重點

replies.msg:
我就咁cop過黎

Hum hum ... in France this is people who attack first 😂 Some violent people like young people who are called "les casseurs" ... They break everything like cars in fire, shop windows or banks ...

There are always protestations every Saturday in France for 7-8 month ... so long and persevering.

Peaceful people screams or walks in streets for defending rights with placards like in Hong Kong.

Yeah and blocking big roads, right

千析唔好學！
